acquisition method: the top 10 most abundant multiply-charged ions were selected in a data-dependent manner
alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide (Sigma I1149) was added to a final concentration of 50 mM
cleavage agent: After digestion with 0.3 μg Trypsin (Promega V5113) for 2 hr
instrument: The QExactive instrument acquired full scan survey spectra
labeling: Protein abundances from the QExactive mass spectrometer were quantified by MaxQuant 1.6.0.16 using 2-plex labeling (Arg10 and Lys8)
